subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed that which lay hidden in knowledge and hath caused all things to testify that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر ما کان مکنونا فی العلم و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله اله هو
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
